metadata.title: Kodai Global Exports | Tapioca Starch, Sago & Agro Products from India
metadata.description: Kodai Global Exports supplies export-ready tapioca starch, sago, tapioca flour, and related agro products from Tamilnadu, India with structured documentation and reliable communication.

openGraph.title: Kodai Global Exports | Tapioca Products from India
openGraph.description: Export-ready tapioca starch, sago, and agro products supplied with clear process and documentation.

slides.title: Industrial & Food Grade {Tapioca Starch}
slides.subtitle: Delivering meticulously refined tapioca starch for international food manufacturing and industrial applications. Sourced directly from premier Tamil Nadu processing facilities.
slides.imageAlt: Premium tapioca starch powder in white bowl

slides.title: High Quality {Tapioca Flour}
slides.subtitle: Finely milled cassava product valued for its light texture and versatility. Ideal for baking, snacks, and gluten-free food preparations.

slides.title: Authentic Indian {Sago Pearls}
slides.subtitle: Exporting uniform, high-yield sago pearls perfect for culinary applications and desserts globally. Guaranteed quality and purity in every shipment.

slides.title: Hand-Selected Indian {Cloves}
slides.subtitle: Bringing the world the intense aroma and flavor of authentic Indian cloves. Carefully harvested and graded for the highest international culinary standards.

slides.title: Single-Origin {Coffee Beans}
slides.subtitle: Sourcing robust and aromatic coffee beans from the high-altitude estates of Southern India. Tailored export solutions for discerning roasters worldwide.

intro.imageAlt: Tapioca starch, sago, cassava roots, and agro products displayed outdoors
intro.featureDescription: Structured processes, documentation, and communication built for dependable export partnerships.
intro.title: A professionally managed agro export company with a {process-first} foundation
paragraphs: Kodai Global Exports supplies tapioca starch, sago, tapioca flour, and related tapioca products for buyers across food, wholesale, and export markets.

Our operations are guided by defined workflows, regulatory awareness, and practical market understanding. We keep product discussions clear, documentation organised, and shipment coordination responsive.
We believe long-term export relationships are built through consistency, transparency, ethical conduct, and steady performance at every stage of business.

markets.title: Supporting tapioca buyers across {international markets}
markets.description: We work with buyers who expect reliable packing, clear export documents, and timely communication across each shipment.
markets.mapAlt: Global markets map for Kodai Global Exports agro product supply

certifications.title: Documentation and compliance support for {international shipments}

cta.title: Looking for tapioca product details?
cta.description: Explore our product range or connect with our export team for packing sizes, product specifications, and shipment documentation.
